# openai_group_users (Data Source)

List users in an organization group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_group_users" "example" {
  group_id = "group_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) group id

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic data source identifier.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.
- `users` (Attributes List) Users returned by the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) email
- `id` (String) id
- `is_service_account` (Boolean) is service account
- `name` (String) name
- `user_type` (String) user type
